violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer concentration observed at 0 ppm. 3-bay sink is to be used to sanitize until dishwasher is serviced and at 50 - 100 ppm (chlorine). New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The door to the outside, located at the lobby entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door lowboy unit observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall designate a ServSafe certified employee as the Certified Food Safety Manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection (RI license). New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
